diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Five-state process model showing all possible transitions between states
diagrams.purpose: Understand how processes move through different execution states and what causes each transition

diagrams.title: PCB Structure
diagrams.description: Structure of Process Control Block showing all information fields
elements: Memory Management Info (base, limit, page tables)
Accounting Info (CPU time used, creation time)
I/O Status (open files, devices, pending I/O)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize all data maintained by OS for each process and understand what's saved during context switching

diagrams.title: Context Switching Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of context switch between two processes
elements: Save state to PCB-A (PC, registers, status)
Update Process A state to Ready
Update Process B state to Running
Jump to saved PC of Process B
diagrams.purpose: Understand the actual mechanism of switching CPU from one process to another and what information is saved/restored
